prompt: Studio product photograph of a heavy natural-cotton canvas tote bag with thick reinforced webbing handles, hanging upright by one handle from a single black iron hook mounted on a soft warm-grey concrete-textured wall. The tote's broad front face is centered to camera, showing the natural slubby weave of the canvas. The tote front is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO screen-print, NO graphics, NO text, NO patches anywhere on the canvas — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. The bag's body has a slight natural sag at the bottom suggesting weight without showing contents. Soft window light from upper-left casts a subtle shadow to the lower-right of the bag. Eye-level straight-on view. Slightly desaturated near-monochrome palette. Hardware-store and supply-shop catalog feel, NOT eco-luxe boutique, NOT lifestyle. No items inside or visible, no people.
